scripts.start: pnpm run clean && pnpm run tsc && pnpm run stop && egg-scripts start --require ts-node/register --daemon --workers=1 --port=4800 --title=egg-server-tether-api
scripts.clean: find app config test -type f \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.js.map' \) -delete && find . -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.js.map' \) ! -name '.autod.conf.js' -delete && find ../../packages/core/src -type f \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.js.map' -o -name '*.d.ts' -o -name '*.d.ts.map' \) -delete && tsc -b --clean && rm -rf dist
